about.title: About PROMETO
about.text: PROMETO is a company based in Morocco, located in Casablanca. Specialized in metalwork, aluminum, and stainless steel, PROMETO offers complete solutions including design, manufacturing, and custom installations. Thanks to our expertise, we support our clients in creating modern, durable projects tailored to their needs.
